candidates.evidence_quote: Really, if you think about the rewards program and the operational execution, we're going to accomplish those things.
we know in sort of the absolute perspective that those locations that typically drive greater patio sales have been impacted
Whatever variability there is in off-premise will continue to be a funny thing for us because of the way we count it
Maybe just on North Italia too, you had strong same-store sales there.
they're practically at the same unit volumes as the rest of the North system, and their margins are great
Made some really strong improvements there on supply chain integration as well.
you alluded to other actions to address North Italia margins, which it sounds like part of that is just price
we have another price increase in October, right at the end of October, for North Italia
We're still, in our math, probably 2% below the cumulative pricing of the industry since 2019.
looking at Flower Child, as David Gordon mentioned, the sales continue to improve. quarter over quarter
as far as the site potential, we feel good about the pipeline, as I said earlier, for 2024
generally the leasing environment is similar to what we may have expected historically, though, in terms of terms
just from a pure inflationary environment, we're saying wage inflation is mid-single digits
Is there a component of that, Matt, that you have off the top of your head on state mandates coming up in, you know, July, September
I think there's always opportunities to offset some of that with productivity
traffic was negative 3.7 for the quarter. on a 1.5 comp
But in June, we were at a mid-single-digit comp.
week to week there can be differences based on holidays or if we're going to run National Cheesecake Day promotions
I'd say that our value scores are pretty stable
we saw that about 60% of our lapsed guests have stated that they have interest in coming within the next six months
you look at the Michigan survey and it's up significantly over the past couple of months
Any feedback on any change in alcohol mix that you would want to call out
when you look at incident rates or desserts as a percentage of sales continue to be 17%
